title: pseudo-fumaria schanginii
intro: Pseudo-fumaria schanginii, also known as Schangin's fumewort, is a plant species within the family Papaveraceae. It is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, and is valued for its ability to treat various health issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, pseudo-fumaria schanginii is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to leverage its health benefits, including relief from respiratory problems and skin irritations.
